name: io.github.MPP32/mpp32-mcp-server
description: Payment layer for AI agents. One MCP, five protocols, thousands of paid APIs your agent can call.

environmentVariables.name: MPP32_AGENT_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Session key from https://mpp32.org/agent-console. Unlocks the full federated catalog and attributes every call to your dashboard. Optional in legacy mode where only native services are reachable.

environmentVariables.name: MPP32_SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Solana private key (base58, hex, or [byte,byte,...] JSON array) used to sign x402 USDC payments on Solana-family networks. Required for services like the MPP32 Intelligence Oracle that settle on Solana mainnet. Stays on your machine, never sent to MPP32 servers.

environmentVariables.name: MPP32_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: EVM private key (64-character hex, optionally 0x-prefixed) used to sign x402 USDC payments on Base/Base-Sepolia/Ethereum via EIP-3009 transferWithAuthorization, and Tempo pathUSD payments. Required for ~85% of the federated catalog which lives on Base. Stays on your machine, never sent to MPP32 servers.

environmentVariables.name: MPP32_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL for custom deployments. Defaults to https://mpp32.org.

environmentVariables.name: MPP32_SOLANA_RPC_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the Solana RPC endpoint used to fetch recent blockhashes when building x402 transactions. Defaults to https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com. Set this if you hit public-endpoint rate limits.

environmentVariables.name: MPP32_PREFERRED_NETWORK
environmentVariables.description: When both Solana and EVM keys are configured and a challenge advertises multiple networks, force one. Accepts: solana, base, evm, ethereum, or a full CAIP-2 string like solana:5eykt4UsFv8P8NJdTREpY1vzqKqZKvdp.

environmentVariables.name: MPP32_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Request timeout in milliseconds for all outbound API calls. Range: 1000-300000. Defaults to 30000 (30 seconds).
